result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Substratum.Tools.dll database sql [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                     DEFAULT                                                    
    -h, --help                         Prints help information                  
    -o, --output     migrations.sql    Output file path for the SQL script      
    -c, --context                      The DbContext class name (required when  
                                       multiple DbContexts exist)

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Substratum.Tools.dll new endpoint [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
        --group                 The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or      
                                Authentication/Mobile)                          
        --name                  The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. CreateOrder)
        --route                 The route pattern (e.g. /orders, /orders/{id})  
        --method                The HTTP method (Get, Post, Put, Delete, Patch) 
        --permission            The permission name (e.g. OrdersCreate)         
        --endpoint-type         The endpoint type (Standard, Void, Stream)      
        --use-result-wrapper    Wrap response in Result<T> (Yes or No, Standard 
                                only)                                           
        --response-type         The response type (SingleResult or              
                                PaginatedResult, Standard only)

commands.payload:
USAGE:

OPTIONS:

        --route                 The route pattern (e.g. /orders, /orders/{id})  
        --method                The HTTP method (Get, Post, Put, Delete, Patch) 
        --permission            The permission name (e.g. OrdersCreate)         
        --endpoint-type         The endpoint type (Standard, Void, Stream)      
        --use-result-wrapper    Wrap response in Result<T> (Yes or No, Standard 
                                only)                                           
        --response-type         The response type (SingleResult or              
                                PaginatedResult, Standard only)

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Substratum.Tools.dll new job [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help        Prints help information                                   
        --scope       The job scope (Global, Group, or Endpoint)                
        --group       The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or                
                      Authentication/Mobile). Required for Group and Endpoint   
                      scope                                                     
        --endpoint    The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login, CreateOrder).  
                      Required for Endpoint scope                               
        --name        The job name (PascalCase, e.g. SendWelcomeEmail,          
                      ProcessPayment)                                           
        --type        The job type (Simple or WithArgs)

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Substratum.Tools.dll new job [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help        Prints help information                                   
        --scope       The job scope (Global, Group, or Endpoint)                
        --group       The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or                
                      Authentication/Mobile). Required for Group and Endpoint   
                      scope                                                     
        --endpoint    The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login, CreateOrder).  
                      Required for Endpoint scope                               
        --name        The job name (PascalCase, e.g. SendWelcomeEmail,          
                      ProcessPayment)                                           
        --type        The job type (Simple or WithArgs)
